I just unlocked the “Porky” badge on @foursquare for checking in to barbecue spots! Brisket all around! http://t.co/wWQnf9Tn

@mdavidallen @BeakerBrowser Threat model here: External actor is able to shut down major parts of US internet infrastructure (S3, DNS, etc)

How do we 
1. Find out what is happening
2. Broadcast information on what is happening on a large scale 
3. As quickly as possible identify the cause and fix it

@mdavidallen I know, but brass tacks; internet and 4G gone tonight. What are the technologies and groups that would immediately need to be used?

1. NYC wifi mesh network 
2. @BeakerBrowser 
3. Use ham radio operators to coordinate mesh network 
???
If the internet and cell phone service went down how would we get information out of the United States? How would we communicate with each other?
vim is fun because sometimes you make a typo and incomprehensible things happen like the document you've been editing has been merged with one from an alternate universe

RT @theintercept: “This is what a police state looks like,” Chelsea Manning said. “Guns drawn during a ‘wellness’ check.” https://t.co/FWWB…
@hilittleguy Aw, thanks Nate. Likewise. Can't imagine how much I've learned from you. Many thanks. Good luck in Portland! Keep in touch.
@marymad thanks so much. =] There's nothing that could keep me away from the bay area for long... Let's get coffee whenever I'm back?
@OakScott Cheers, thanks! And I'm sure we will eventually, the world is too small. Let me know if you find yourself in NY.
@socialistlib510 Cheers, thanks! Let me know if you ever wanna do some stuff with your photos? Been trying to do something long on #oo
And, well, I'm off. Goodbye bay area. Good bye Oakland. Goodbye San Francisco. Goodbye #OccupyOakland. I love y'all. I'll miss y'all.
@bdbreedlove Strong yes, I even indulged in this new rolled ice cream which I asked them to smash cereal into
I spent at least 30 minutes straight last night yelling about ice cream so in case anybody is wondering I’m living my best life

Friend visiting from California: oh you have an election to cover tonight? Where? 
Me: … California. 
Friend visiting from California: shit
This rules https://t.co/HDJ4c7q0xd
While you’re stalling, I’m evolving

@mdavidallen I also bought a directional WiFi antenna with standard antenna ports so that if there were a mesh network I could point at it or repurpose an old TV antenna, idk, unsure where to direct this anxiety

@mdavidallen This train of thought has led me down a rabbit hole ending in me wanting to set up an dial in BBS and figure out how to make that type of thing accessible in 2019 - I also topped off my bug out bag

@jakedowns @observablehq How did you get your notebook to be so beautiful (is there a dark mode I don't know about)
@izzyz @liveblocks “Where is that monthly aggregation of the dataset?” “Oh, I left it on the table in the data processing room. We should maybe hang it by the entrance so its easier to find.”

@izzyz @liveblocks Say I have 3 cells that are different options for a visual form, I want to put them on a virtual white board and let people grab them, change them, and then place their variations underneath, or fling them off into the distance, I want to build a shared memory palace

@izzyz I would love to have a collaborative space like mozilla hubs or maybe something more basic with @liveblocks where me and some colleagues (keyboard/mouse, not necessarily in VR) can arrange things spatially and tweak parameters together and see the results
I am so excited about this https://t.co/UONmeEmy1r
